--- title: "Router & Pipeline Modes" description: "Dynamic agent selection with data-driven, performance-driven, hybrid, and LLM-based router strategies." date: today format: html: self-contained: true embed-resources: true code-fold: true code-tools: true --- ## Introduction The `RouterAgent` decides which subset of the 6 agents runs in each round. It supports four strategies: `data_driven`, `performance_driven`, `hybrid`, and `llm`. This notebook demonstrates each strategy and the ablation pipelines (`NoMemoryPipeline`, `NoRouterPipeline`, `SingleAgentPipeline`). ## Setup ::: {#setup .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os import warnings warnings.filterwarnings("ignore") os.environ.setdefault("FF_LOG_LEVEL", "warning") import numpy as np import pandas as pd from sklearn.datasets import make_classification print("Router & Pipeline Modes Demo") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Router & Pipeline Modes Demo ``` ::: ::: ## Load Data ::: {#cell-load-data .cell cache='true' execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} X, y = make_classification( n_samples=250, n_features=8, n_informative=5, random_state=42 ) df = pd.DataFrame(X, columns=[f"col_{i+1}" for i in range(X.shape[1])]) df["target"] = y df.head() ``` ::: {#load-data .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ```{=html}
col_1 col_2 col_3 col_4 col_5 col_6 col_7 col_8 target

``` ::: ::: ## Router Strategies ::: {#router-strategies .cell cache='true' execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.agents.router import RouterAgent from feature_forge.config import LLMConfig, RouterConfig, Settings settings = Settings( task="classification", router=RouterConfig(strategy="hybrid"), llm=LLMConfig( model="deepseek-chat", api_key=os.environ.get("FF_LLM__API_KEY", ""), ), ) router = RouterAgent(settings) # Analyze dataset characteristics description = {c: {"type": "numerical"} for c in df.columns if c != "target"} characteristics = router.analyze_dataset( df.drop(columns=["target"]), description=description ) print("Dataset characteristics:") for k, v in characteristics.items(): print(f" {k}: {v}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Dataset characteristics: total_columns: 8 numerical_columns: ['col_1', 'col_2', 'col_3', 'col_4', 'col_5', 'col_6', 'col_7', 'col_8'] categorical_columns: [] datetime_columns: [] has_enrich_description: False target_column: None ``` ::: ::: ## Data-Driven Selection ::: {#data-driven .cell execution_count=4} ``` {.python .cell-code} router_dd = RouterAgent(Settings(router=RouterConfig(strategy="data_driven"))) selected_dd = router_dd.select_agents_data_driven(characteristics) print(f"Data-driven selected: {selected_dd}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-error} ::: {.ansi-escaped-output} ```{=html} 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

AttributeError: 'RouterAgent' object has no attribute 'select_agents_data_driven'
``` ::: ::: ::: ## Performance-Driven Selection ::: {#performance-driven .cell execution_count=5} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Simulate some historical performance data router_perf = RouterAgent(Settings(router=RouterConfig(strategy="performance_driven"))) for agent in router_perf.agent_names: router_perf.agent_performance[agent] = [np.random.uniform(0.01, 0.05) for _ in range(3)] selected_perf = router_perf.select_agents_performance_driven() print(f"Performance-driven selected: {selected_perf}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-error} ::: {.ansi-escaped-output} ```{=html}

----> 6 selected_perf = router_perf.select_agents_performance_driven()

AttributeError: 'RouterAgent' object has no attribute 'select_agents_performance_driven'
``` ::: ::: ::: ## LLM-Based Selection ::: {#llm-router .cell execution_count=6} ``` {.python .cell-code} router_llm = RouterAgent( Settings(router=RouterConfig(strategy="llm")), llm_client=None, # Will be set by pipeline ) print(f"LLM router strategy: {router_llm.strategy}") print(f"LLM router prompt length: {len(router_llm.router_prompt)} chars") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` LLM router strategy: llm LLM router prompt length: 1903 chars ``` ::: ::: ## Ablation Pipelines ::: {#cell-ablation-pipelines .cell cache='true' execution_count=7} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.api import MALMASFeatureEngineer config = Settings( task="classification", n_rounds=1, llm=LLMConfig( model="deepseek-chat", api_key=os.environ.get("FF_LLM__API_KEY", ""), ), ) X = df.drop(columns=["target"]) y = df["target"] ablations = { "full": "full", "no_memory": "no_memory", "no_router": "no_router", "unary_only": "unary", } ablation_results = {} for name, mode in ablations.items(): try: fe = MALMASFeatureEngineer(config=config, mode=mode) fe.fit(X, y) ablation_results[name] = { "features": len(fe.selected_features), "codes": len(fe.feature_codes), "transform_failures": len(fe.transform_failures), } except Exception as exc: ablation_results[name] = {"error": str(exc)[:120]} pd.DataFrame.from_dict(ablation_results, orient="index") ``` ::: {#ablation-pipelines .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=7} ```{=html}
error
full OpenAI provider requires an API key
no_memory OpenAI provider requires an API key
no_router OpenAI provider requires an API key
unary_only OpenAI provider requires an API key
``` ::: ::: ## Plot: Ablation Comparison ::: {#plot-ablation .cell execution_count=8} ``` {.python .cell-code} import matplotlib.pyplot as plt abl_df = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(ablation_results, orient="index") if "features" in abl_df.columns: abl_df = abl_df.dropna(subset=["features"]) fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4)) abl_df["features"].plot(kind="barh", ax=ax, color="coral") ax.set_title("Features Generated by Pipeline Mode") ax.set_xlabel("Feature Count") plt.tight_layout() plt.show() ``` ::: ## Summary - **data_driven**: Selects agents based on dataset column types - **performance_driven**: Selects top-performing agents from historical gains - **hybrid**: Union of data-driven + performance-driven - **llm**: Uses an LLM call to reason about which agents to activate - Ablations let you measure the contribution of memory and routing individually
